title: Maturity Level Vocabulary

terms.definition: Semantic scope filter; not a framework layer.
Baseline scope for small business tenant generation and basic Microsoft 365 study.
Governance-oriented scope for small and medium organizations.
Advanced study and architecture-thinking scope; not a default execution baseline.

relationship_chain: MaturityLevel -> Scope decision -> ARCH applicability -> BLP template selection -> MTX matrix scope -> AUT readiness boundary
